rationale: The citing paper’s core contribution is a Bayesian method for inferring consumer characteristics from aggregate data under endogenous list selection, whereas the cited paper is a Facebook field experiment on privacy controls and personalized ad click-through; this suggests only indirect topical overlap (targeting/personalization) from the notes. The matched evidence is just a single DOI reference entry with no in-text citation context, so there is not enough evidence to confidently classify it as clearly incidental or clearly substantive.
